title: Object Switch
result_description: An object held in frame transforms into a different object the instant a hand wipes across it.

inputs.name: object_a_clip
inputs.what_to_film: Lock the camera. Hold object A still in frame, then pass a hand / quick motion across the object (or briefly cover it).

inputs.name: object_b_clip
inputs.what_to_film: Without moving the camera, swap to object B in the exact same position and repeat the same hand motion.

params.note: cut at the frame where the hand fully covers the object (the wipe moment)
place object B's clip right after the cut so its hand-reveal lines up with object A's wipe
nudge the cut so the hand position matches across the switch
add a magic / whoosh SFX on the switch

result.description: Object A appears to morph into object B under the passing hand.
success_criteria: Hand position matches across the cut
Object B sits in the same spot as object A
